mapper.select: SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY qestnrTmplatTy, TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_DC qestnrTmplatCn, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_PATH_NM qestnrTmplatCours FROM TB_QUSTNR_TMPLAT WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, A.QESTNR_ID, A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID qestnrQesitmId, A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID, ( SELECT IEM_CN FROM TB_QUSTNR_IEM WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_IEM_ID = A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID ) IEM_CN, COUNT(A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID) QUSTNR_IEM_ID_CNT, ROUND((100/ (SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT WHERE QUSTNR_QESITM_ID = A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID) ) * COUNT(A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID)) QUSTNR_PERCENT FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId} AND A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId} AND (A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID != '') GROUP BY A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID,A.QESTNR_ID, A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID, A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID

SELECT A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, A.QESTNR_ID, A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID qestnrQesitmId, A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID, A.ETC_ANSWER_CN, A.RESPOND_ANSWER_CN, A.RESPOND_NM FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId} AND A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId} AND (A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID IS NULL OR A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID = '')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_QUSTNR_RESPOND_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND TRIM(QESTNR_ID) = TRIM(#{qestnrId})
AND TRIM(QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID) = TRIM(#{qestnrTmplatId})
SELECT MBER_ID EMPLYR_ID, MBER_NM EMPLYR_NM, SEXDSTN_CODE, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE(),'YYYYMMDD') BRTH FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE 1=1 AND ESNTL_ID = #{uniqId}

SELECT A.QESTNR_ID, A.QUSTNR_SJ qestnrSj, A.QUSTNR_PURPS qestnrPurps, A.QUSTNR_WRITNG_GUIDANCE_CN qestnrWritngGuidanceCn, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE) END QESTNR_BEGIN_DE, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE) END QESTNR_END_DE, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.QUSTNR_TRGET qestnrTrget, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO A WHERE 1=1 AND A.QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId} AND A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID qestnrQesitmId, A.QESTNR_ID, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.QESTN_SN, A.QESTN_TY_CODE, A.QESTN_CN, A.MXMM_CHOISE_CO, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId FROM TB_QUSTNR_QESITM A WHERE 1=1 AND A.QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId} AND A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID qestnrQesitmId, A.QESTNR_ID, A.IEM_SN, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID, A.IEM_CN, A.ETC_ANSWER_AT, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId FROM TB_QUSTNR_IEM A WHERE 1=1 AND A.QESTNR_ID = #{qestnrId} AND A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID = #{qestnrTmplatId}

SELECT A.QESTNR_ID qestnrId, A.QUSTNR_SJ qestnrSj, A.QUSTNR_PURPS qestnrPurps, A.QUSTNR_WRITNG_GUIDANCE_CN qestnrWritngGuidanceCn, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_BGNDE) END qestnrBeginDe, CASE WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE)) = 8 THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),1,4)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),5,2)||'-'||SUBSTRING(TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE),7,2) ELSE TRIM(A.QUSTNR_ENDDE) END qestnrEndDe, TRIM(A.QUSTNR_TRGET) qestnrTrget, TRIM(A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID) qestnrTmplatId, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT R WHERE TRIM(R.QESTNR_ID) = TRIM(A.QESTNR_ID) AND TRIM(R.FRST_REGISTER_ID) = #{loginEsntlId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END PARTCPTN_AT, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, B.USER_NM AS FRST_REGISTER_NM, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO A, VW_USER_MASTER B WHERE 1=1 AND A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = B.ESNTL_ID
AND A.QUSTNR_SJ LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND B.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND ( A.QUSTNR_TRGET IS NULL OR TRIM(A.QUSTNR_TRGET) = '' OR A.QUSTNR_TRGET = '00' OR A.QUSTNR_TRGET = #{loginOccp} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT R WHERE TRIM(R.QESTNR_ID) = TRIM(A.QESTNR_ID) AND TRIM(R.FRST_REGISTER_ID) = #{loginEsntlId} )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT R WHERE TRIM(R.QESTNR_ID) = TRIM(A.QESTNR_ID) AND TRIM(R.FRST_REGISTER_ID) = #{loginEsntlId} )
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO A, VW_USER_MASTER B WHERE 1=1 AND A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = B.ESNTL_ID
AND A.QUSTNR_SJ LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND B.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND ( A.QUSTNR_TRGET IS NULL OR TRIM(A.QUSTNR_TRGET) = '' OR A.QUSTNR_TRGET = '00' OR A.QUSTNR_TRGET = #{loginOccp} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT R WHERE TRIM(R.QESTNR_ID) = TRIM(A.QESTNR_ID) AND TRIM(R.FRST_REGISTER_ID) = #{loginEsntlId} )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT R WHERE TRIM(R.QESTNR_ID) = TRIM(A.QESTNR_ID) AND TRIM(R.FRST_REGISTER_ID) = #{loginEsntlId} )
SELECT QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_TY qestnrTmplatTy FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT SET QUSTNR_IEM_ID=#{qustnrIemId}, RESPOND_ANSWER_CN=#{respondAnswerCn}, RESPOND_NM=#{respondNm}, ETC_ANSWER_CN=#{etcAnswerCn}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = sysdate(), LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT_ID = #{qestnrQesrspnsId}
mapper.select: SELECT QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT_ID qestnrQesrspnsId, ( SELECT QUSTNR_SJ FROM TB_QESTNR_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND QESTNR_ID = A.QESTNR_ID ) qestnrSj, ( SELECT QESTN_TY_CODE FROM TB_QUSTNR_QESITM WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_QESITM_ID = A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID ) QESTN_TY_CODE, ( SELECT QESTN_CN FROM TB_QUSTNR_QESITM WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_QESITM_ID = A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID ) QESTN_CN, ( SELECT IEM_CN FROM TB_QUSTNR_IEM WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_IEM_ID = A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID ) IEM_CN, A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID, A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID qestnrQesitmId, A.QESTNR_ID, A.RESPOND_ANSWER_CN, A.RESPOND_NM, A.ETC_ANSWER_CN, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT_ID = #{qestnrQesrspnsId}

SELECT QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT_ID qestnrQesrspnsId, ( SELECT QESTN_TY_CODE FROM TB_QUSTNR_QESITM WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_QESITM_ID = A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID ) QESTN_TY_CODE, ( SELECT QESTN_CN FROM TB_QUSTNR_QESITM WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_QESITM_ID = A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID ) QESTN_CN, ( SELECT IEM_CN FROM TB_QUSTNR_IEM WHERE 1=1 AND QUSTNR_IEM_ID = A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID ) IEM_CN, A.QUSTNR_IEM_ID, A.QUSTNR_QESITM_ID, A.QESTNR_ID, A.RESPOND_ANSWER_CN, A.RESPOND_NM, A.ETC_ANSWER_CN, A.QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID qestnrTmplatId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, (SELECT USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER WHERE ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) FRST_REGISTER_NM, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') as LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT A WHERE 1=1
AND ETC_ANSWER_CN LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND RESPOND_ANSWER_CN LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND RESPOND_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT WHERE 1=1
AND ETC_ANSWER_CN LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND RESPOND_ANSWER_CN LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
AND RESPOND_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT ( QUSTNR_RSPNS_RESULT_ID, QUSTNR_QESITM_ID, QESTNR_ID, QUSTNR_TMPLAT_ID, QUSTNR_IEM_ID, RESPOND_ANSWER_CN, RESPOND_NM, ETC_ANSWER_CN, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID )VALUES( #{qestnrQesrspnsId}, #{qestnrQesitmId}, #{qestnrId}, #{qestnrTmplatId}, #{qustnrIemId}, #{respondAnswerCn}, #{respondNm}, #{etcAnswerCn}, sysdate(), #{frstRegisterId}, sysdate(), #{lastUpdusrId} )
